_comment: Community sample (no-config subset of 45 verified OSS servers). Running this fetches+executes each package via npx/uvx. Licenses verified from repo/package metadata. Browser servers may download a runtime and could hit the per-server timeout (recorded failed, fail-safe). Run from repo root. The harness reads declared tools/prompts/resources only and never calls a tool.
